'''Hightower Conglomerate''' was a civil construction firm on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In reality, it was a front for the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal syndicate. Underbidding the competition when vying for a contract, a series of cost overruns would then flow into their account.

{{Company-stub}}
